introSection: Torbellino is a Beijing Jiuhua Amusement Rides Manufacturing roller coaster currently operating at Parque de la Costa since 2010.

sections.title: Ride
sections.content:
When the coaster starts, the train slowly exits the station and makes a gentle turn before ascending the lift hill. Once at the top, the train is released into a series of tight, fast-paced turns, weaving left and right in quick succession. This sequence of helices and sharp curves creates strong lateral forces as the train spirals downward.

After the main spiral, the train continues through a series of small drops and further twisting turns, maintaining speed. Toward the end of the ride, the train navigates a final set of quick directional changes before entering the brake run.

sections.title: Train
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
Torbellino is a Beijing Jiuhua Amusement Rides Manufacturing roller coaster currently operating at Parque de la Costa since 2010.



When the coaster starts, the train slowly exits the station and makes a gentle turn before ascending the lift hill. Once at the top, the train is released into a series of tight, fast-paced turns, weaving left and right in quick succession. This sequence of helices and sharp curves creates strong lateral forces as the train spirals downward.

After the main spiral, the train continues through a series of small drops and further twisting turns, maintaining speed. Toward the end of the ride, the train navigates a final set of quick directional changes before entering the brake run.

Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 4 riders per car.
